query:
INSERT INTO supportGroups (name, description, url, category, country, region, contactEmail, contactPhone, published, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('Alzheimer''s Society', 'The UK''s leading dementia charity providing information, support, and advice for anyone affected by dementia. Offers a national helpline, local services, and online support.', 'https://www.alzheimers.org.uk', 'National Charity', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'enquiries@alzheimers.org.uk', '0333 150 3456', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('Dementia UK', 'Specialist dementia nursing charity providing Admiral Nurses who give expert practical and emotional support to families affected by dementia.', 'https://www.dementiauk.org', 'National Charity', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'info@dementiauk.org', '0800 888 6678', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('Age UK', 'Provides information, advice, and support for older people and their families, including those affected by dementia. Offers befriending services and local support groups.', 'https://www.ageuk.org.uk', 'National Charity', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'contact@ageuk.org.uk', '0800 678 1602', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('Dementia Friends', 'A national initiative run by Alzheimer''s Society to change perceptions of dementia and help create dementia-friendly communities across the UK.', 'https://www.dementiafriends.org.uk', 'Community Initiative', 'United Kingdom', 'National', NULL, NULL, TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('Carers UK', 'Provides expert advice, information, and support for unpaid carers, including those caring for someone with dementia.', 'https://www.carersuk.org', 'Carers Support', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'info@carersuk.org', '0808 808 7777', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('Young Dementia UK', 'Specialist charity supporting people with young onset dementia (diagnosed under 65) and their families across the UK.', 'https://www.youngdementiauk.org', 'Specialist Support', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'info@youngdementiauk.org', '0300 222 1122', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('Dementia Adventure', 'Charity enabling people with dementia to access nature and the outdoors through supported holidays and activities.', 'https://dementiaadventure.co.uk', 'Activities & Wellbeing', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'info@dementiaadventure.co.uk', '01245 237548', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('The Lewy Body Society', 'Provides information and support for people affected by Lewy body dementia, including dementia with Lewy bodies and Parkinson''s disease dementia.', 'https://www.lewybody.org', 'Specialist Support', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'info@lewybody.org', '01942 914000', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('Rare Dementia Support', 'UCL-based service providing support for people affected by rare dementias including frontotemporal dementia, posterior cortical atrophy, and primary progressive aphasia.', 'https://www.raredementiasupport.org', 'Specialist Support', 'United Kingdom', 'National', 'rare.dementia@ucl.ac.uk', '020 3448 0828', TRUE, NOW(), NOW()),
('NHS 111', 'Free NHS advice line available 24/7 for urgent medical help and advice when it''s not a life-threatening emergency.', 'https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-services/urgent-and-emergency-care-services/when-to-use-111/', 'Emergency Services', 'United Kingdom', 'National', NULL, '111', TRUE, NOW(), NOW());
